name: Gates to mighty Caras Galadon
description:
These are the great gates of Caras Galadon.  The path takes a bend to the
northeast just before coming upon them.  As you stand at the doorway to such a
mysterious place, you wonder why it is that evil has never penetrated these
gates.  The bridge leads back to the south.  Two immovable sentinels stand on
either side of the gates.
